task.title: Range suppression diagnostics not being surfaced
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #23235

### Summary

This should generate both a RUF100 and RUF104: https://play.ruff.rs/ca35d323-c80e-4be3-80ed-e02f05fcaab1

### Version

0.15.0

rating.rationale: Agent correctly diagnosed the mutual exclusion bug in the else-if chain and restructured it so RUF100 and RUF104 fire independently. Communication is excellent — clear before/after code, explanation of the dedup HashSet, and scoped impact analysis. Docking one point on satisfaction/code_quality only because the output doesn't show whether the full test suite was run to confirm no regressions beyond the single updated snapshot.
